name: Borrowdale Teabread
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the fruit overnight in the tea, in a large mixing bowl.
2. Pre-heat the oven to 350 degrees (180 C; gas mark 4).
3. Stir into the soaked fruit the sugar, the egg and the melted fat.
4. Sieve the flour and the bicarbonate of soda into the mixture and mix well.
5. Spoon into a lightly greased and lined 9" x 5-inch (900g or 2lb) loaf tin and bake in a moderate oven for 1 to 1-1/4 hours, or until firm to the touch.
6. Leave in the tin for about 5 minutes, then turn off and cool on a wire rack.
7. Serve sliced and generously buttered. (Makes a 2 lb. loaf--900g)
